findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'status: federally-listed endangered biological determination: no effect' (5x); 'cumberland county/ cliffdale landfill 7583 lowell harris road fayetteville, cumb...' (3x).

findings.description: Self-Certification Letter checkboxes displayed as empty/unchecked (□) when the filled-in PDF (page 2) clearly shows them as filled/checked (dark squares). This changes the meaning from 'these determinations were selected' to 'these are options to be selected.'
findings.evidence: PDF page 2 shows three filled/dark checkboxes (■) next to 'no effect', 'may affect, not likely to adversely affect', and 'no Eagle Act permit required' determinations. HTML renders them as empty checkbox symbols: '<li>□ "no effect" determinations...'  '<li>□ "may affect, not likely to adversely affect"...'  '<li>□ "no Eagle Act permit required"...'

findings.description: The NCNHP map from PDF page 29 (a substantive map showing project boundary, buffered project boundary, managed areas, and geographic context) is missing as an image. The HTML replaces it with a text-based description of map labels and legend info, but no tag is present.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 29 contains a full-color map titled 'NCNHDE-25195: Cliffdale Landfill' showing the project boundary, buffered project boundary, managed areas (hatched), roads, and waterways. HTML replaces this with: '

Map Area Labels: Woodmark Dr, Christina St, Cliffdale Rd...' and '

Legend Info: March 5, 2024
Managed Area (MAREA)
Buffered Project Boundary
Project Boundary

' — no tag exists for this map.

findings.description: The NC Department of Natural and Cultural Resources logo (colored squares pattern) from the NCNHP letter header on PDF page 26 is missing as an image in the HTML. The organizational text is preserved as a heading but the graphical logo is absent.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 26 letterhead includes a distinctive multi-colored squares logo for 'NC DEPARTMENT OF NATURAL AND CULTURAL RESOURCES'. The HTML renders only the text as '

NC DEPARTMENT OF NATURAL AND CULTURAL RESOURCES

' with no corresponding tag for the logo graphic.
